title: SPAIN enforcement action against FREE TECHNOLOGIES EXCOM, S.L. (10,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 10,000 on FREE TECHNOLOGIES EXCOM, S.L. The controller had reset user passwords and communicated the new passwords to the clients via email. However, the email was not encrypted and did not implement any other approp...
